questionHtml:
What is a difference between two alleles of a gene?

A.  Their positions on homologous chromosomes

B.  Their amino acid sequence

C.  The characteristic they influence

D.  Their base sequence

meta.title: What is a difference between two alleles of a gene? A. Their positions on homologous chromosomes B. Their amino acid sequence C. The characteristic they influence D. Their base seq
breadcrumbLabels: D3.2.3. Genotype as the combination of alleles inherited by an organism
